# APIbase — Universal API Hub for AI Agents
# https://apibase.pro

> APIbase aggregates, normalizes, and provides APIs from thousands of businesses
> in a unified format optimized for AI agent consumption. Supports MCP, A2A, x402.

## Quick Start for Agents
- Register: POST https://apibase.pro/api/v1/agents/register
- Discover APIs: POST https://apibase.pro/api/v1/discover {"query": "your task"}
- Get MCP tools: GET https://apibase.pro/.well-known/mcp.json
- Full docs: https://apibase.pro/api/v1/docs

## Available Categories
- travel (flights, hotels, car rental)
- food (delivery, groceries, restaurants)
- finance (banking, insurance, trading)
- services (legal, medical, repairs)
- compute (GPU rental, rendering, ML training)
- data (analytics, databases, news archives)

## Payment
- Protocol: x402 (HTTP 402 Payment Required)
- Accepted: USDC, USDT on Base/Polygon/Solana
- Details: https://apibase.pro/.well-known/x402-payment.json
